briefdescription.para: Feed a new sample and get the filtered output.

simplesect.para: Filtered value (average of the last window samples).

briefdescription.para: Reset the filter to its initial state.

parameterdescription.para: Smoothing factor (0–255). Higher = more responsive. Equivalent to alpha = value/256. Example: 64 ≈ 0.25 (slow), 192 ≈ 0.75 (fast).

briefdescription.para: Feed a new sample and get the filtered output.
Reset the filter to its initial state.

parameterdescription.para: Window size (should be odd for a true median; must be <= SYN_FILTER_MAX_WINDOW).

briefdescription.para: Feed a new sample and get the filtered output.

simplesect.para: Median of the last window samples.

briefdescription.para: Reset the filter to its initial state.

parameterdescription.para: Caller-provided Q16 history buffer of size num_taps.

briefdescription.para: Feed a new Q16 sample and get the FIR filtered output.
Reset FIR filter sample history to 0.
